text: Science has a clearer story about context dependent memory than social media does. Imagine walking into a room and suddenly remembering something from last week. That’s context dependent memory at work. It means our memories are tied to the environment we’re in. Change the setting, and you may forget! Studies show that people recall information better in the same context where they learned it. So, if you study in a coffee shop, try testing in one. You might be amazed at your results! Want to dive deeper into how your brain works? Like and follow for more mind-blowing science!
